things.name: Old Town (Abanotubani Sulphur Baths)
things.description: Historic Metekhi district with natural hot sulphur public baths used for 1,500 years

things.name: Narikala Fortress
things.description: 4th-century fortress above the city with a cable car and panoramic views of the Mtkvari River

things.name: Mtatsminda Park & Funicular
things.description: Mountain park reached by funicular with an amusement park and spectacular city views

things.name: Georgian National Museum
things.description: Gold treasures, medieval art and Georgian history from Paleolithic to Soviet times

things.name: Sioni Cathedral
things.description: 6th-century Georgian Orthodox cathedral housing the 4th-century Cross of St Nino

things.name: Rustaveli Avenue
things.description: Tbilisi's main boulevard with the Opera House, Parliament and Art Museum

things.name: Kazbegi National Park Day Trip
things.description: Gergeti Trinity Church on a cliff with Mount Kazbek (5047m) as a backdrop

things.name: Georgian Wine & Qvevri Wine Tourism
things.description: Georgia's 8,000-year wine tradition using clay qvevri amphorae - world's oldest wine culture

things.name: Peace Bridge
things.description: Striking 2010 pedestrian bridge over the Kura River designed by Italian architect Michele De Lucchi

things.name: Fabrika
things.description: Soviet sewing factory converted into Tbilisi's hippest hostel, co-working and nightlife complex
